criteria_verification.criterion_text: Method consults both `stage_log` (terminal completion) and the
criteria_verification.evidence: may_start_autobuild walks async_task_reader.list_autobuild_states(build_id) for live lifecycle and calls stage_log_reader.is_autobuild_approved(build_id, feature_id) when the async_tasks lifecycle is non-terminal — implementing DDR-006's 'SQLite is authoritative, async_tasks is advisory' rule. Test TestStageLogAndAsyncTaskConsultation::test_stale_async_task_overridden_by_stage_log_approval verifies the cross-consultation: a non-terminal async_tasks entry whose feature is also marked approved in stage_log does not block dispatch.

criteria_verification.evidence: No lint or format tooling (ruff, black, flake8, mypy) is configured in pyproject.toml — the project ships only pytest configuration. - Phase 3: `python-api-specialist` (Implementation)
No seam tests detected for cross-boundary feature. Consider adding seam/contract/boundary tests to validate technology boundary interactions. This is a recommendation, not a blocking gate.
